profile.name: Alex Rivera
profile.headline: Senior Software Engineer
profile.summary: Experienced engineer with a track record of delivering scalable systems, leading cross-functional teams, and driving technical strategy across product and platform domains.

experience.title: Staff Engineer
experience.summary: Leading platform reliability and architecture decisions for multi-region commerce services.
achievements: Introduced service-level objectives and observability standards across six teams.
Drove migration to Kubernetes and Terraform-managed infrastructure.
Established architecture coaching sessions for senior engineers.

experience.title: Principal Software Engineer
experience.summary: Led delivery for customer-facing platform modernization across product, architecture, and engineering operations.
achievements: Defined a modular web platform used by three internal product teams.
Reduced release lead time through pipeline and test strategy changes.
Mentored senior engineers and ran architecture review practices.

experience.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
experience.summary: Built internal tools and commercial applications spanning frontend systems, APIs, and reporting pipelines.
achievements: Delivered a shared TypeScript frontend foundation adopted across five products.
Implemented Node.js services that improved integration reliability.
Partnered with analytics teams on SQL-heavy operational reporting.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.summary: Worked on data services and platform automation in a mixed Python and JavaScript environment.
achievements: Created Python-based data processing workflows for internal teams.
Supported cloud migration work and infrastructure automation.
Contributed to frontend dashboards for operational visibility.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.summary: Supported client web projects with a focus on implementation quality, testing, and maintainability.
achievements: Maintained business websites and small custom web applications.
Improved test coverage for key client deliverables.
Collaborated closely with designers and project managers.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.summary: Contributed to backend services and internal admin portals in a regulated domain.
achievements: Implemented role-based access controls for internal tooling.
Built integration jobs between clinical and billing systems.
Helped standardize release checklists and QA handoffs.

experience.title: Freelance Web Developer
experience.summary: Delivered websites and lightweight web applications for local businesses while completing university studies.
achievements: Shipped brochure and booking websites for eight small businesses.
Set up basic deployment and monitoring workflows for clients.
Managed client communication, scope, and delivery end-to-end.

education.details: Focus on distributed systems and software engineering.
Coursework in application development, databases, and project delivery.
